description_long: This is a pair of high-top sneakers with a predominantly white upper and a unique printed graphic on the toe and lower side areas. The shoes feature a classic lace-up design with visible eyelets and laces, and the tongue is integrated into the upper structure. The toe box and part of the side panels display a grayscale photographic image, adding a distinctive artistic touch. The soles are flat and appear to be made of rubber, with the rest of the shoe likely constructed from synthetic leather or fabric. The overall build suggests comfort and durability, suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A pair of high-top white sneakers with a grayscale photographic print on the toe and side, featuring a classic lace-up design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the open collars, laces, and the printed graphic on the toe boxes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the high-top silhouette and the lower portion of the graphic print on the outer sides.
description_view_2: Bottom view revealing the full extent of the grayscale photographic print on the toe and forefoot area of the soles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the high-top profile and the continuation of the graphic print.
